formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\text{min} G^{'} & = & \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{e \in A_{w}}{\sum} x_{w , f} \left(e\right) \times c \left(e\right) + \underset{\left(i , j\right) \in E}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T} \left[\alpha \left(i , j , t\right) \times \left(\sum_{\tau = t}^{t + A T_{i , j} - 1} \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{\left(i , j\right) \in E_{w}}{\sum} x_{w , f} \left(u_{i , j}^{\tau} , v_{i , j}^{\tau}\right) - 1\right)\right] \\ & & + \underset{\left(i , j\right) \in E}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T} \left[\beta \left(i , j , t\right) \times \left(\sum_{\tau = t}^{t + D T_{i , j} - 1} \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{\left(i , j\right) , \left(j , i^{'}\right) \in E_{w}}{\sum} x_{w , f} \left(v_{i , j}^{\tau} , u_{j , i^{'}}^{\tau}\right) - 1\right)\right] \\ & & + \underset{j \in J S}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T} \left[\delta \left(j , t\right) \times \left(\sum_{\tau = t}^{t + H_{j} - 1} \underset{\left(i , j\right) \in \left(\overset{⌣}{E}\right)_{j}}{\sum} \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{\left(i , j\right) , \left(j , i^{'}\right) \in E_{w}}{\sum} x_{w , f} \left(v_{i , j}^{\tau} , u_{j , i^{'}}^{\tau}\right) - 1\right)\right] \\ & & + \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T - 1} \left[\gamma \left(i , t\right) \times \left(\sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{\left(i , j\right) \in E_{w}}{\sum} x_{w , f} \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , u_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) - c a p_{i}\right)\right]\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eqn0021
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned} \text{min} G^{'} & = & \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{i , j , t \left|\right. \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , u_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) \in A_{w}}{\sum} \left\{x_{w , f} \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , u_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) \times \left[c \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , u_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) + \gamma \left(i , t\right)\right]\right\} \\ & & + \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{i , j , t \left|\right. \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t}\right) \in A_{w}}{\sum} \left\{x_{w , f} \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t}\right) \times \left[c \left(u_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t}\right) + \sum_{\tau = t - A T_{i , j} + 1}^{t} \alpha \left(i , j , \tau\right)\right]\right\} \\ & & + \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{i , j , t \left|\right. \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) \in A_{w}}{\sum} \left[x_{w , f} \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right) \times c \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , v_{i , j}^{t + 1}\right)\right] \\ & & + \sum_{w = 1}^{W} \sum_{f = 1}^{m_{w}} \underset{i , j , j^{'} , t \left|\right. \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , u_{j , j^{'}}^{t}\right) \in A_{w}}{\sum} \left\{x_{w , f} \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , u_{j , j^{'}}^{t}\right) \times \left[c \left(v_{i , j}^{t} , u_{j , j^{'}}^{t}\right) + \sum_{\tau = t - D T_{i , j} + 1}^{t} \beta \left(i , j , \tau\right) + \sum_{\tau = t - H_{j} + 1}^{t} \underset{i^{'} \neq i , \left(i^{'} , j\right) \in \left(\overset{⌣}{E}\right)_{j}}{\sum} \delta \left(j , \tau\right)\right]\right\} \\ & & - \left\{\underset{\left(i , j\right) \in E}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T} \left[\alpha \left(i , j , t\right) + \beta \left(i , j , t\right)\right] + \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T - 1} \left[\gamma \left(i , t\right) \times c a p_{i}\right] + \underset{i \in J S}{\sum} \sum_{t = 1}^{T} \delta \left(i , t\right)\right\}\end{aligned}
